name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: Gemini appraisal prompt template (model id, output shape, template lines).

entities.name: prompt
entities.brief: LLM prompt pack for stamp image appraisal (listing text or catalog JSON).
entities.description: One row per prompt id; template_lines are joined with newlines for the model. Files live under xframe/data/prompts/<prompt_id>.json in entity-store shape { "prompt": [ { ... optional prompt_invocations: [...] } ] }.

fields.name: prompt_id
fields.description: Stable id matching the filename stem (e.g. stamp_listing, xframe); referenced by upload commit metadata prompt field.

fields.name: brief
fields.description: Short label for UI or docs.

fields.name: preferred_model
fields.description: Default Gemini model id when this prompt has no prompt_invocations entries (or none enabled), or when GEMINI_MODEL overrides only the fallback path.

fields.name: output_format
fields.description: Whether appraisal writes listings/<stem>.txt (plain model text) or listings/<stem>.json (parsed catalog object).

fields.name: template_lines
fields.description: Prompt body lines; appraisal joins with newline. Placeholders: __IMAGE_BASENAME__, __FIRST_LINE__, __META_JSON__, __TARGET_JSON__, __NOTES_JSON__. For output_format json, Gemini and OpenRouter use API structured output (stamp array schema), not inlined consolidated schema.

fields.name: gemini_output_lines
fields.description: Optional lines appended to template_lines only for google_gemini when output_format is txt. Omitted for json prompts (structured output is set in the API client). Same placeholders as template_lines.

fields.name: prompt_invocations
fields.description: Optional nested appraisal targets (provider + model) for this prompt. When omitted or empty, appraisal uses a single Gemini call with preferred_model. Exactly one enabled row should have primary_for_listing true when any are present.
